title: Embhlitfe Balloon Weight, 20 Pcs Colorful Balloon Weights and Ribbon (Star Shape) for Parties, Birthday, Celebrations Decorations Reusable(4 Ribbons)
features: 【Package Contents】This package includes 20 balloon weights and 4 matching ribbons in 4 bright colours and cute star shapes. The enough quantity to meet all your decoration needs, helping to create a lively and vibrant party atmosphere.

【Premium Quality Materials】These balloon weights are made of high-quality, eco-friendly plastic, durable, lightweight and easy to carry, allowing the helium balloons to be quickly and safely fixed in place. They are durable and can be reused many times.

【Convenient and Beautiful】This helium balloon weights and ribbons have different colors ribbons, with cute shapes and various colors. They are not only can keep your balloons from floating away but also serve as creative and attractive decorations. It iseasy to thread ribbon through and can beautifully decorate your dining table, adding charm to any party, bringing an extra touch of fun.

【Size】 Each balloon weight measures approximately 7 × 7.5 cm / 2.75 × 2.95 in, Each star weighs about 7.5 g. Each roll of ribbon is 5 meters long. Larger balloons may require multiple balloon weights. So you need to add the quantity of this product according to the size of the balloon.
【Wide Application】Our balloon weights are suitable for birthdays parties, weddings, baby showers, kidsparties, Christmas and holiday celebrations perfect for bringing a cheerful vibe to any event.
description: Specification: Package Includes：20 balloon weights and 4 matching ribbons Color：Colorful Size：As shown in the picture Material：These balloon weights are made of high-quality, eco-friendly plastic. Feature: Comes in four bright colors with a fun, festive look. The colorful bases and ribbons easily enhance party decorations. These helium balloon weights not only keep your balloons from floating away but also serve as creative and attractive decorations. You just need a piece of rope or ribbon to connect balloons with balloon weights to fixed balloon and prevent helium-filled balloons from blowing away. Notices: Larger balloons may have to hang multiple balloon weights. Please allow slight size errors due to manual measurement. Please allow slight color differences due to different displays.
